author: Markiplier
text:
TRY NOT TO PANIC | Subnautica 2 - Part 2
There’s a lot of new things in this ocean and it’s a lot more to take in than I was prepared for! Also don’t ask why I’m out of breath…
LISTEN TO DISTRACTIBLE ►► https://open.spotify.com/show/2X40qLyoj1wQ2qE5FVpA7x

author: Markiplier
text:
Where the hell is Iron Lung...?
Iron Lung is finally releasing digitally May 31st on YouTube Movies! It's been a long time coming and I'm very tired but very grateful and also at Cannes.
